name: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus
quote: This is not the one to use for politics. It's like playing with fire. Please work across party lines, across ideology, across beliefs. We need to behave.

name: Xi Jinping
quote: China has always acted with openness, transparency, and responsibility. We have shared information with the WHO and the international community in the most timely manner.

name: Donald Trump
quote: The United States will be spending this money on our vaccine and other therapeutics. Therefore, I am able to proudly call this the 'Trump Administration's accomplishment.'

name: Joe Biden
quote: We did it. We took care of COVID. We're going to beat this pandemic. And it's not going to be easy. But that's what America does — we never quit, we never give up.

name: Dr. Anthony Fauci
role: Director, NIAID (1984–2022); Chief Medical Advisor to Biden
quote: Science is a process of getting closer and closer to the truth. Science is not the enemy of the people; it is the safeguard of the people. Attacks on me quite frankly are attacks on science.

name: Boris Johnson
quote: Stay at home. Protect the NHS. Save lives. This is the moment when every one of us must play our part. We must act like any wartime government — and do whatever it takes to support our economy.

name: Jacinda Ardern
quote: We are going hard and we are going early. We have one of the most significant advantages any country in the world could have — we can see what is coming. And we have the ability to act now.

name: Angela Merkel
quote: Since German reunification, no, since World War II, there has been no challenge to our nation that has demanded such a degree of common and united action. This is serious and you should treat it seriously.

name: Giuseppe Conte
quote: We are imposing stricter measures to protect the health of all Italians. We must limit movement across the country. There is no time to wait. The decisions we make will test us.

name: Dr. Li Wenliang
quote: I think a healthy society shouldn't have just one voice. I had seen the information and I had a responsibility to tell my patients about the risk.

name: Narendra Modi
quote: From midnight today, the entire country will be in lockdown. This lockdown is totally essential for India to win the battle against coronavirus. It will save you, your family, and the country.

name: Jair Bolsonaro
quote: Some will die. That's life. It's a virus. We need to face it bravely and fight it. The Brazilian people don't want to be sheltered like that. Brazilians have to be studied. We rarely get sick.

name: Ursula von der Leyen
quote: The EU has now secured access to 300 million doses. This is a milestone because vaccines will help us get our lives back on track — but only if they are accessible to all Europeans.

name: Dr. Deborah Birx
quote: I knew I was being sidelined. I knew they wanted me not to talk. I still believed I could influence policy — even if it was only to blunt what I could see was coming.

name: Dr. Mike Ryan
role: WHO Executive Director, Health Emergencies Programme
quote: Be fast. Have no regrets. You must be the first mover. The virus will always get you if you wait. If you need to be right before you move, you will never win. Perfection is the enemy of the good when it comes to emergency management.

name: Scott Morrison
quote: Australia has a plan. The National Cabinet has worked effectively and transparently to navigate Australia through a once-in-a-generation challenge. We are beating this virus.

name: Anders Tegnell
role: Sweden State Epidemiologist, Public Health Agency
quote: Wearing a mask in public is not something that is sustainable. Sustainability is the key word here. In the long run, it will not hold. People need to continue to work and to live as normally as possible.

name: Emmanuel Macron
quote: We are at war — in a health war, certainly. We are not fighting against an army or another nation. But the enemy is there: invisible, elusive, and advancing. And this requires our general mobilization.

name: Uğur Şahin
quote: I read a paper about the new disease in China on January 25, 2020. I realized this was going to be a pandemic. I told my wife: we have to work on a vaccine. We stopped all other work.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
quote: It is a matter of deep disappointment and frustration that Africa, which has contributed so much to the development of vaccines, is once again at the back of the queue. This must stop.
